recommendations.title: Baraka
recommendations.overview: A paralysingly beautiful documentary with a global vision—an odyssey through landscape and time—that attempts to capture the essence of life.

recommendations.title: Inside Asda: Bigger, Better, Cheaper?
recommendations.overview: The supermarket giant that rose high by taking prices low.

recommendations.title: Anelka: Misunderstood
recommendations.overview: Bad boy or football genius? Famed French footballer Nicolas Anelka's controversial legacy is examined in an unflinching documentary.

recommendations.title: Titan: The OceanGate Submersible Disaster
recommendations.overview: OceanGate's Titan tourist submersible imploded in 2023 on a deep-sea dive to the Titanic. This documentary details how a bold vision ended in tragedy.

recommendations.title: The Dissident
recommendations.overview: When Washington Post journalist Jamal Khashoggi disappears after entering Saudi Arabia’s consulate in Istanbul, his fiancée and dissidents around the world are left to piece together the clues to a brutal murder and expose a global cover up perpetrat

recommendations.title: The Inventor: Out for Blood in Silicon Valley
recommendations.overview: With a magical new invention that promised to revolutionize blood testing, Elizabeth Holmes became the world’s youngest self-made billionaire, heralded as the next Steve Jobs. Then, overnight, her 10-billion-dollar company dissolved. The rise and fal

recommendations.title: The Look of Silence
recommendations.overview: An optician grapples with the Indonesian mass killings of 1965-1966, during which his older brother was exterminated.

recommendations.title: Hammamet
recommendations.overview: The last years of Bettino Craxi, one of the most important and controversial italian leader of the 1980's.

recommendations.title: Earthlings
recommendations.overview: Using hidden cameras and never-before-seen footage, Earthlings chronicles the day-to-day practices of the largest industries in the world, all of which rely entirely on animals for profit.

recommendations.title: What Is a Woman?
recommendations.overview: Matt Walsh's controversial doc challenges radical gender ideology through provocative interviews and humor.
